sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 76:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 76:1
items.html: The more important vessels grow first, then the small vessels, beginning with Keter, then Hochma, etc., through the vessel of Malchut, which comes last.
